memberdef.argsstring: (amrex::Real val, amrex::Real upper, amrex::Real lower)
memberdef.name: mod_dom

memberdef.argsstring: (splines_at_particles< degx, degy, degz > &spline, amrex::Real weight, amrex::Real charge, amrex::Array4< amrex::Real > const &rho, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, GEMPIC_SPACEDIM+1 > const &dxi)
memberdef.name: gempic_deposit_rho

memberdef.argsstring: (splines_at_particles< degx, degy, degz > &spline, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Array4< amrex::Real >, vdim > &eArray)
memberdef.name: evaluate_fem_efield

detaileddescription.para: Evaluation of a FEM one form

memberdef.argsstring: (splines_at_particles< degx, degy, degz > &spline, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, vdim > &weight, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Array4< amrex::Real >, vdim > &jArray)
memberdef.name: accumulate_j_fem_integral_point

detaileddescription.para: Accumulation: contribution for one point TODO: This function should better combine all points from one interval to reduce the number of loops

memberdef.argsstring: (splines_at_particles< degx, degy, degz > &spline, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, GEMPIC_SPACEDIM > &position_old, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, GEMPIC_SPACEDIM > &position_new, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, vdim > &velocity, amrex::Real charge, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, GEMPIC_SPACEDIM+1 > const &dxi, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, GEMPIC_SPACEDIM > const &plo, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Array4< amrex::Real >, vdim > &jArray)
memberdef.name: accumulate_j_fem_integral

detaileddescription.para: Accumulation of the current for a FEM solver with integral over time (line integral) Currently this is implemented for degree one with two quadrature points in the line integral for each box

memberdef.argsstring: (amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, GEMPIC_SPACEDIM > &position_old, amrex::Real position_new, spline1d_at_particles< degp - 1 > spline_y_cell, spline1d_at_particles< degp > spline_y_node, spline1d_at_particles< degp - 1 > spline_z_cell, spline1d_at_particles< degp > spline_z_node, spline1d_at_particles< degp > spline_new, spline1d_at_particles< degp > spline_old, amrex::Real charge, const amrex::Real *dx, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, GEMPIC_SPACEDIM+1 > const &dxi, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, GEMPIC_SPACEDIM > const &plo, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Array4< amrex::Real >, int(vdim/2.5) *2+1 > const &bArray, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Array4< amrex::Real >, vdim > const &jArray, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, 2 > &fields, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, plength > &primitive)
memberdef.name: accumulate_j_update_v_fem_integral

detaileddescription.para: Accumulation of the integrated current and integrated b field for v update along dimension pdim. This routine is for the zigzagging Hamiltonian splitting scheme. Note this is currently only implemented for 3d3v.

memberdef.argsstring: (splines_at_particles< degx, degy, degz > &spline, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, vdim > &velocity, amrex::Real charge, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, GEMPIC_SPACEDIM+1 > const &dxi, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Array4< amrex::Real >, vdim > &jArray)
memberdef.name: accumulate_j_fem_integral

detaileddescription.para: Accumulation of the current for a FEM solver with integral over time (line integral) Currently this is implemented for Gauss-Quadrature with only one point

memberdef.argsstring: (splines_at_particles< degx, degy, degz > &spline, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Array4< amrex::Real >, int(vdim/2.5) *2+1 > const &bArray)
memberdef.name: evaluate_fem_bfield

detaileddescription.para: Field evluation of a two form described by finite elements

memberdef.argsstring: (amrex::Real charge_weight_dxi_coeff, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, vdim > &vel, splines_at_particles< degx, degy, degz > const &spline, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Array4< amrex::Real >, vdim > const &jArray, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Array4< amrex::Real >, vdim > const &eArray, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Array4< amrex::Real >, int(vdim/2.5) *2+1 > const &bArray, bool field_int=false)

memberdef.argsstring: (amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, vdim > vel, amrex::Real dt, amrex::Real chargemass, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, vdim > &Ep)
memberdef.name: push_v_efield

detaileddescription.para: Push the velocity with a given electric field

memberdef.argsstring: (amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, GEMPIC_SPACEDIM > oldX, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, vdim > oldV, amrex::Real dt, amrex::Real chargemass, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Array4< amrex::Real >, int(vdim/2.5) *2+1 > const &bArray, amrex::Real tolerance_particle, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, GEMPIC_SPACEDIM > plo, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, GEMPIC_SPACEDIM > phi, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, GEMPIC_SPACEDIM+1 > dxi, splines_at_particles< degx, degy, degz > &spline)

detaileddescription.para: Push the position and the velocity (only the vxB part) in a nonlinear iteration

memberdef.argsstring: (amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, GEMPIC_SPACEDIM > pos, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, GEMPIC_SPACEDIM > plo, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, GEMPIC_SPACEDIM > phi, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, vdim > vel, amrex::Real dt, amrex::Real chargemass, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, vdim > &Ep, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, int(vdim/2.5) *2+1 > &Bp)

memberdef.argsstring: (amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, GEMPIC_SPACEDIM > plo, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, GEMPIC_SPACEDIM > phi, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, GEMPIC_SPACEDIM > pos, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, vdim > vel, amrex::Real dt)

memberdef.argsstring: (amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, GEMPIC_SPACEDIM > pos, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, GEMPIC_SPACEDIM > plo, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, GEMPIC_SPACEDIM > phi, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, vdim > vel, amrex::Real dt, amrex::Real chargemass, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, vdim > &Ep, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, int(vdim/2.5) *2+1 > &Bp)
memberdef.name: push_particle_boris

memberdef.argsstring: (amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, GEMPIC_SPACEDIM > &position, amrex::Real mu, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, GEMPIC_SPACEDIM+1 > const &dxi, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, GEMPIC_SPACEDIM > const &plo, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Array4< amrex::Real >, int(vdim/2.5) *2+1 > &bArray, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Array4< amrex::Real >, vdim > &mArray, splines_at_particles< degx, degy, degz > &spline)
memberdef.name: gempic_deposit_magnetization

memberdef.argsstring: (amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, GEMPIC_SPACEDIM > &position, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, GEMPIC_SPACEDIM+1 > const &dxi, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, GEMPIC_SPACEDIM > const &plo, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Array4< amrex::Real >, int(vdim/2.5) *2+1 > &bArray)
memberdef.name: evaluate_grad_mod_bfield

detaileddescription.para: Field evluation of a two form described by finite elements

memberdef.argsstring: (splines_at_particles< degx, degy, degz > &spline, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Array4< amrex::Real >, vdim > const &eArray)
memberdef.name: evaluate_efield

briefdescription.para: Computes electric field at particle position.

detaileddescription.para:
vdim
Number of components of electric field
degx
Spline degree in x
degy
Spline degree in y
degz
Spline degree in z
spline
Spline evaluated at given particle position
eArray
Degrees of freedom of electric field
amrex::GpuArray<amrex::Real, vdim> values of electric field at particle position
Electric field is a one form so its components are $ E_x(x,y,z) = \sum e_x S_c(x) S_n(y) S_n(z)/\Delta x $ $ E_y(x,y,z) = \sum e_y S_n(x) S_c(y) S_n(z)/\Delta y $ $ E_y(x,y,z) = \sum e_z S_n(x) S_n(y) S_c(z)/\Delta z $ where $S_c$ are the cell centered splines of degree d-1 and $S_c$ the node centered splines of degree d.
!!! SCALING NEEDS TO BE ADAPTED (divisions by $\Delta x,y,z)

memberdef.argsstring: (splines_at_particles< degx, degy, degz > &spline, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Array4< amrex::Real >, vdim > const &bArray)
memberdef.name: evaluate_bfield

briefdescription.para: Evaluated magnetic field (2-form) at particle positions.

parameterdescription.para: Contains splines evaluated at some particle position

simplesect.para: amrex::GpuArray<amrex::Real, vdim> Values of components of 2-form at particle positions

memberdef.argsstring: (splines_at_particles< degx, degy, degz > &spline, amrex::Real weight, amrex::Array4< amrex::Real > const &rho)
memberdef.name: gempic_deposit_rho_C3

briefdescription.para: Deposits charge density on cells of dual grid.

detaileddescription.para: Here nodal splines seem to be used for deposition where integral of cell splines are expected

parameterdescription.para: Splines evaluated at given particle position

memberdef.argsstring: (S const &spline, spline1d_at_particles< degp > const &spline_new, spline1d_at_particles< degp > const &spline_old, amrex::Real weight, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, GEMPIC_SPACEDIM > const dx, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Array4< amrex::Real >, int(vdim/2.5) *2+1 > const &bArray, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Array4< amrex::Real >, vdim > const &jArray, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, 2 > &fields, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, plength > &primitive)
memberdef.name: accumulate_j_update_v_C2

briefdescription.para: Updates J and B along one grid direction.

detaileddescription.para:
Computes for each component i, J_i from \int_t Rho and \int_t v_i x B by integrating over the B-splines
S
splines_at_particles type
vdim
Number of Components of B and J
degp
Degree of spline in direction of integration (x, y or z)
degp1
Degree of spline in next direction (cyclic)
degp2
Degree of spline in second next direction (cyclic)
pdim
Direction of integration (x=0, y=1, z=2)
plength
spline
3D spline at particle position
spline_new
1D spline at new particle position along given direction
spline_old
1D spline at old particle position along given direction
weight
Particle charge * weight * dx
dx
bArray
Degrees of freedom of B as primal 2-form
jArray
Degrees of freedom of J as dual 2-form
fields
Contribution of B (the 2 that are not in integration direction)
primitive
Temporary array for holding difference of primitives (used for each direction)

memberdef.argsstring: (amrex::Real charge, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Real, vdim > &vel, splines_at_particles< degx, degy, degz > const &spline, amrex::GpuArray< amrex::Array4< amrex::Real >, vdim > const &jArray, amrex::Real dxi)
memberdef.name: gempic_accumulate_j
